_comment: Overlay applied with `tauri build --config tauri.windows.json` when building the C++-backend flavor on Windows. Merges on top of tauri.conf.json. The `cpp-artifacts/x64-windows/` tree is produced by build.rs and contains every runtime library the shim loads — the exact set varies by vcpkg `usd` port flavor (monolithic `usd_ms.dll` vs the current split `usd_*.dll`), so we ship the whole staging directory rather than enumerating individual filenames that drift between ports. The `usd/` subdirectory inside carries the OpenUSD plugin tree (with a synthesized top-level `plugInfo.json` manifest) that the shim registers at startup via `PlugRegistry::RegisterPlugins`.
